hooks.command: cat "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/bootstrap-core-policy.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/bootstrap-execution-policy.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/bootstrap-guardrails.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/bootstrap-hitl-questioning.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/bootstrap-rosetta-files.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/plugin-files-mode.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/rules/INDEX.md" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex/workflows/INDEX.md" && echo "" && echo "Rosetta Core Plugin Path: $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/core-codex"
